base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brinstar_ripper_drift — a character from 1986 metroid. Ripper — green flat spike-platform-enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ripper — green flat spike-platform-enemy; drifts horizontally at fixed height; static sprite; invincible, used as platform
